hero.subtitle: Valora is your financial assistant that finds improvements for you. On your own terms.
hero.trustWaitlist: Early access is the form further down this page. If you already have access, use Sign up below.
hero.trustSignupSuffix: Use Sign up if you already have access.

problem.headline1: You already know what you should do.
problem.body: It's not laziness. It's friction — and friction costs.

stats.text: postpone switching — even though they know better.

problem.quote: "I've known for two years that I should do this — but I couldn't bring myself to."
problem.statsFootnote: Figures are illustrative summaries from qualitative research, not nationally representative statistics.

industry.caption: Industry problem
industry.body: Swedish households on average pay thousands of kronor too much. Not because they're careless, but because no one keeps track for them.

proof.quoteBottom: "Money used to give me constant anxiety. Now it feels much simpler."

cards.quote: "I would never have done this myself. Now I don't have to think about it."
"I'd rather pay than carry this in my head."

waitlist.clerkSuccess: You're on the waitlist. We'll email you when your spot is ready.

waitlist.title: Request early access

waitlist.notePlaceholder: Mortgage, personal loan, car insurance, home insurance

errors.noteMax: Note must be at most 500 characters

brand.statementSupport: You set the rules. We handle the rest.

items.title: Tell us your situation
items.desc: And what you want to achieve.

items.title: Valora looks for improvements automatically
items.desc: And notifies you when proposals are found.

items.title: You approve — or you don't
items.desc: Nothing switches without your sign-off. You always see why, how much, and when.

items.a: No. Valora is an autonomous financial system that optimizes your finances on top of banks and insurers.

items.q: Do I need to switch banks?
items.a: No — and sometimes, yes. You never need to switch banks to use Valora. If Valora identifies an improvement that requires a switch, it only happens after your explicit approval.
You choose what gets connected. We don't move money without your yes. Strong encryption — both in transit and at rest.
Pricing is set at launch. Early users always pay less.
